meta.prepared_by: Senior Technical Product Manager and Software Architect

product_overview: Tolo is an intelligent educational platform designed to integrate learning, artificial intelligence, and gamification into a seamless user experience for students, teachers, and supervisors.
core_goals: Provide a secure and advanced authentication system supporting biometric login, two-factor authentication, magic links, and intrusion detection.
Deliver AI-powered tools including an exam generator, study assistant chatbot, and intelligent teacher search and content recommendation.
Offer a full-featured Learning Management System (LMS) supporting course content, exams with automatic grading, and resource management.
Engage users through gamification with badges, points, and leaderboards to motivate learning.
Enhance productivity with time management tools such as weekly schedules and study timers.
Maintain high performance with caching strategies and efficient backend architecture.
Ensure robust infrastructure management with Kubernetes, Terraform, and CI/CD pipeline.
Provide comprehensive monitoring using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.
Create an accessible and user-friendly UI supporting RTL languages and dark mode.
key_features: Advanced authentication system with biometric login (WebAuthn), two-factor authentication (TOTP), session tracking, recovery codes, and security logging.
AI-powered exam generator, study assistant chatbot, and smart teacher search functionality.
Comprehensive LMS including courses, lesson display, exams with automatic correction, and educational resource library management.
Gamification features including achievements, points system, and competitive leaderboards.
Real-time communication via WebSocket channels for chat, forums, and notifications.
Time and task management tools including study schedules, time trackers, and reminders.
Robust backend API routes powered by Next.js with Prisma ORM for database interactions.
Reusable UI components designed for accessibility, RTL support, and theme toggling (dark/light modes).
user_flow_summary: Users register and authenticate using multi-factor and biometric methods for enhanced security.
Students browse courses, access lessons, and participate in AI-generated exams.
Teachers and supervisors manage course content, track student progress, and utilize AI tools for recommendations and assistance.
Users participate in the community via forums and real-time chat, receiving notifications for updates.
Gamification motivates users by awarding achievements and points, visible on leaderboards.
Users organize their study time using scheduling tools and receive reminders to enhance productivity.
Admins monitor system health and security through dashboards employing real-time metrics and logs.
validation_criteria: Authentication system correctly supports biometric login, TOTP, magic links, session tracking, and logs security events.
AI modules generate exams accurately, provide helpful study assistance, and enable effective search for teachers and content.
LMS features function correctly including lesson display, exam taking and grading, and resource handling.
Gamification awards and leaderboard features work correctly and update in real-time.
Real-time chat and forum systems deliver messages and notifications reliably with minimal latency.
Time management tools correctly schedule, track, and alert users on study activities.
System performance meets benchmarks with caching and resource optimization.
Infrastructure deployments using Kubernetes and Terraform succeed with zero downtime.
Monitoring tools provide accurate and timely metrics, logs, and alerts.
UI supports RTL languages and theme toggling, providing a consistent user experience across devices.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login, registration, and session management using JWT/NextAuth/custom implementation.

features.name: API Routes
features.description: Backend API endpoints for various application functions.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: User dashboard for navigating the application.
